song.title: Glorious
song.presentation: V1 C1 V2 C2 B C2 B
song.lyrics:
. Intro . G / Bm / Em / C (2x’s)
[V1] . G Bm 1) Look inside the mystery, . Em See the empty cross . Dadd4 See the risen Saviour, . Cadd9 Victorious and strong . G Em No one else above Him . Em None as strong to save . Dadd4 He alone has conquered, . Cadd9 The power of the grave [C1] Chorus . C G Glorious, my eyes have the seen the glory of the Lord . C G Glorious, He stands above the rulers of the Earth [C2] Chorus . C G Glorious, my eyes have the seen the glory of the Lord . C G Glorious, He stands above the rulers of the Earth . D Em Glorious, glorious . C D G / Gmaj7 / Em / C (2x’s) Lord you are glorious [B] Bridge . G / Gmaj7 / Em C Oh___________ You are Glorious --- [V2] . G Bm Look beyond the tombstone . Em See the living God . Dadd4 See the resurrected . Cadd9 The ruler of my heart . G Bm No one else above him . Em None to match his worth . Dadd4 The hope of his returning . Cadd9 Fills the universe
